description.value: Your body produces gases that you can expel and internally ignite. You can exhale a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC). After using Fire Breath, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Fire Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.
